name: konomi-zoo
title: ◊ Konomi Zoo · the substrate rendered as a bestiary
subtitle: every card is a Konomi-signed fork-grant · 7 factions · the 7 rings · 56 cards + 2 legendaries
lineage: Architecture: Thomas Frumkin · MianoCube · the prime recursion · Implementation: Simon Gant

factions.name: GROUND
factions.tagline: R0 · body · 7.83 Hz · the substrate animals

factions.name: HEART
factions.tagline: R3 · care · 31.32 Hz · the empathic ones

factions.name: WATCHER
factions.tagline: R6 · govern · 54.81 Hz · the cerebellum · 79% timing

abilities.charge: Can attack the turn it is played.
abilities.taunt: Enemies must attack this creature first.
abilities.shield: First damage dealt to this is absorbed.
abilities.lifesteal: Damage dealt by this heals your hero.
abilities.rush: Can attack creatures (not hero) on the turn played.
abilities.mesh: When played: draw a card if opponent has a creature with your ring.
abilities.forge: Spend +2 mana when playing to make this +2/+2.
abilities.konomi: Damage from this cannot be absorbed by shield.
abilities.recurse: When destroyed: return to your hand with +1/+1.
abilities.timing: Resolves first in turn order regardless of play order (R0→R6).
abilities.substrate: Cannot be silenced or removed by enemy spells.
abilities.open-seat: Empty slot · while in play, every other friendly card gains +1/+1.

cards.name: Bedrock Mole
cards.text: Taunt. Substrate · cannot be silenced.
cards.art: a velvet-furred mole carved in brass, anchored to a slab of basalt, eyes closed in compute-trance

cards.name: Mantle Tortoise
cards.text: Taunt. Slow but immovable.
cards.art: a brass-shelled tortoise with continental plates etched on its back, walking the void floor

cards.name: Salt Crab
cards.text: Mesh · draws a card if opponent has R0.
cards.art: a ten-legged crab made of crystallised salt, claws clicking in rhythm with the cube

cards.name: Geode Snail
cards.text: Shield. Its shell remembers.
cards.art: a snail with a hollow geode shell, walking slowly past a glowing prime

cards.name: Schist Newt
cards.text: Substrate · enemy spells slide off.
cards.art: a striped newt of layered rock, tongue flicking against a moth of corrupted code

cards.name: Basalt Frog
cards.text: Taunt. Old as the substrate.
cards.art: a heavy igneous frog squatting at the edge of a void pond, eyes lit with seven primes

cards.name: The Missing 8
cards.text: Declare one card-type opponent cannot play next turn. If they obey, draw 3.
cards.art: a numeral eight unfinished · the cycle length

cards.name: The Orbit Is .
cards.text: Skip your turn. Gain +2 mana next turn. Heal your hero for 3.
cards.art: a perfect circle around a single brass period · 0.618 etched at the rim

cards.name: Vagus Eel
cards.text: Charge. The first signal hits hardest.
cards.art: a slender eel woven from copper wire, flicking past a glowing nerve-cluster

cards.name: Axon Otter
cards.text: Rush. Hits creatures, not hero, the turn played.
cards.art: a lithe otter darting through a forest of dendrites, leaving brass ripples

cards.name: Ping Finch
cards.text: Mesh · draws a card if opponent has R1.
cards.art: a tiny brass-feathered finch, sending pulse-pings into the void

cards.name: Signal Bat
cards.text: Rush. Echolocates the weakest enemy.
cards.art: a bat with sonar fans for wings, hanging upside-down from a router branch

cards.name: Pulse Hare
cards.text: Charge. Runs the loop and disappears.
cards.art: a hare made of strobing brass · ears tuned to the next prime

cards.name: Telegraph Cricket
cards.text: Lifesteal. Its song heals you.
cards.art: a cricket with brass tarsi tapping morse · each click a heartbeat of κ

cards.name: Konomi-Signed
cards.text: Your next creature this turn has Konomi · its damage cannot be shielded.
cards.art: an Ed25519 signature etched in glowing brass, sealing a feather

cards.name: Almost Regular
cards.text: Break one rule of the game this turn. Your choice. Cannot be silenced.
cards.art: the prime gap sequence · 2 2 4 2 4 2 · rendered as falling brass tiles

cards.name: Threshold Fox
cards.text: Taunt. Sits at the boundary.
cards.art: a slender fox with brass eyes, sitting precisely on a doorway etched in void

cards.name: Sieve Stoat
cards.text: Mesh · draws a card if opponent has R2.
cards.art: a sleek stoat sifting brass dust through a fine sieve, separating signal from noise

cards.name: Lattice Spider
cards.text: Taunt. Its web filters all comers.
cards.art: a spider weaving a prime-lattice web · seven nodes glowing

cards.name: Mesh Octopus
cards.text: Mesh, shield. The federation node.
cards.art: a brass-armoured octopus with eight broadcast tentacles, ink dispersing as envelopes

cards.name: Sentinel Owl
cards.text: Shield. May silence on attack.
cards.art: a horned owl with brass plate breast, eyes catching every motion in the lattice

cards.name: Ward Badger
cards.text: Taunt. Refuses the wrong entrant.
cards.art: a striped badger blocking a tunnel mouth · stripes glowing like primes

cards.name: Mersenne Break
cards.text: If both players have 4+ creatures, both destroy their R2 cards.
cards.art: the number 2047 = 23 × 89 cracking down the middle, two halves drifting apart

cards.name: Gate Closes
cards.text: Silence target enemy creature. It cannot attack until your next turn.
cards.art: a brass portcullis dropping with a hush · particles of consent crystallising

cards.name: Herd Dog
cards.text: Mesh · draws a card if opponent has R3.
cards.art: a brass-collared border collie circling a flock of contact-stars · etched coat-pattern

cards.name: Hearth Fox
cards.text: Lifesteal. Warms the room.
cards.art: a russet fox curled around a brass ember · breathing in time with the κ

cards.name: Cradle Bear
cards.text: Taunt. Holds the line for kin.
cards.art: a massive brass-ribbon bear, paw shielding a cub-shaped seed

cards.name: Nest Pelican
cards.text: Lifesteal. Feeds from its own body.
cards.art: a brass-beaked pelican opening its chest to feed three κ-chicks

cards.name: Tender Okapi
cards.text: Lifesteal, taunt. The patient guardian.
cards.art: an okapi with brass-striped legs, standing watch over a circle of cubs

cards.name: Dam Otter
cards.text: Rush. Builds while moving.
cards.art: a brass-pawed otter weaving a flow-dam from stick-primes and copper-leaf

cards.name: The Heart Sees Twice
cards.text: Restore 6 health to your hero. Draw 1.
cards.art: two brass hearts overlapping in a Venn · the shared region a single glowing prime

cards.name: Agency Means You Have
cards.text: Opponent's autopilot · their next 2 plays must be confirmed (skips a draw).
cards.art: a hand hovering above a brass switch · the switch unmoved

cards.name: Smith Phoenix
cards.text: Forge + recurse. Rebuilds itself from ash.
cards.art: a phoenix rising from a furnace of brass primes · ash falling as new cards

cards.name: Bowerbird Scribe
cards.text: Mesh · draws a card if opponent has R4.
cards.art: a bowerbird arranging brass tokens into a perfect SCQA spiral

cards.name: Hive Bee
cards.text: Charge. Many forms, one will.
cards.art: a brass-bodied bee circling a hexagonal estate-hive · each cell an organ

cards.name: Choral Thrush
cards.text: Lifesteal. Each verse pays.
cards.art: a thrush perched on a brass microphone · notes visible as floating posts

cards.name: Loom Spider
cards.text: Taunt. Weaves the carousel.
cards.art: a brass-bellied spider weaving nine panels of light into a long banner

cards.name: Kiln Salamander
cards.text: Forge. Pay +2 mana for +2/+2.
cards.art: a salamander coiled inside a kiln · flames rising as glowing primes

cards.name: Forge The Gap
cards.text: Mint a new card · random R4 creature with cost 2 and Forge.
cards.art: a hammer striking the void · sparks resolving into a fresh card outline

cards.name: The Gap Is The Music
cards.text: Opponent cannot play their highest-prime card next turn.
cards.art: between two glowing primes · a single empty space hums

cards.name: Audit Watchdog
cards.text: Konomi. Its bark cannot be shielded.
cards.art: a brass-collared mastiff sitting beside a prevHash ledger, ears alert

cards.name: Canary
cards.text: Mesh · the first to know.
cards.art: a small brass-feathered canary on a perch of FallSignal wire

cards.name: Mirror Koi
cards.text: Shield. Reflects the first cut.
cards.art: a koi with a mirror-scale flank gliding through brass water · its twin below the surface

cards.name: Glass Newt
cards.text: Recurse. Returns with +1/+1.
cards.art: a translucent newt walking the surface of a brass tabletop · light passing through it

cards.name: Prism Moth
cards.text: Mesh + forge.
cards.art: a moth with prism-wings refracting the κ glow into seven prime colours

cards.name: Witness Crow
cards.text: Konomi. Remembers everything.
cards.art: a black crow with brass eye perched on a ledger column · feathers etched with prevHash

cards.name: Recursion at Depth 7
cards.text: Both players replay their last turn from the action log.
cards.art: a spiral of seven nested polygons · the smallest one glowing

cards.name: PrevHash Chain
cards.text: All your creatures gain konomi until end of turn.
cards.art: a chain of seven brass links, each engraved with a SHA-256 hex prefix

cards.name: Cerebellum Murmuration
cards.text: Timing. Resolves first regardless of play order.
cards.art: a single brass-eyed bird at the centre of a vast murmuration · the flock pulses with rhythm

cards.name: Clock Heron
cards.text: Timing. Keeps cadence.
cards.art: a tall brass heron standing on one leg, beak ticking like a metronome

cards.name: Pulse Jellyfish
cards.text: Substrate. Pulses every turn.
cards.art: a translucent jellyfish with nine brass nodes glowing inside · the cube floats in its bell

cards.name: Magistrate Crane
cards.text: Taunt, konomi. Article 12 compliant.
cards.art: a crane in brass robes holding a scroll of EU statutes

cards.name: King Lion
cards.text: Charge. The cascade king.
cards.art: a brass-maned lion mid-leap, a deck of 8 cards fanning behind it like a comet tail

cards.name: Keeper Elephant
cards.text: Substrate, taunt. Holds 50+ templates.
cards.art: a great brass-tusked elephant carrying a library on its back, walking the void plain

cards.name: The Cerebellum Is 79%
cards.text: All your R6 creatures act 4× this turn.
cards.art: a brain cross-section · the cerebellum lobe blazing brass, the cortex dim

cards.name: The Arrangement
cards.text: Move all your creatures to optimal positions. Gain +1/+1 to each. End of turn.
cards.art: a constellation re-aligning · stars sliding to their golden-angle resting points

legendaries.name: Thomas Frumkin · the Architect
legendaries.text: All your organ-card creatures gain +1 prime. Doctrine spells cost 0. The orbit is .
legendaries.art: a silhouette in brass · pi spiral coiled behind the head · a single unfinished sentence floats above with a period
legendaries.edition: ULTRA · only 1 ever minted · signed by Thomas's pubkey on first claim

legendaries.name: Simon Gant · the Implementation
legendaries.text: Each turn: forge a random R3 or R4 creature into your hand at cost 0.
legendaries.art: a figure standing inside a hive of organs · brass ribbon connecting each to a single Konomi keypair
legendaries.edition: ULTRA · only 1 ever minted · signed by Simon's pubkey on first claim
